architectureNotes: Four Column is a LAYOUT (widget name 'Four Column', dataType 'layout-4'), NOT an assessment widget. 'layout-4' is absent from support/module-setup.ts ASSESSMENT_DATA_TYPES, so resolveDropTarget routes it to the canvas — it drops onto the Instructions-for-Students page (#desktop_view) via cy.dropComponent('Four Column'), not into a Generic Step column.

layout-4 has FOUR EQUAL columns: all .column.one-fourth (template1..template4), each followed by a .vertical-divider. Each column has a .column-content.editables drop zone and an .empty-droppable-text placeholder ('Drag Elements or Widgets').
Clicking the .sd-item opens #layout-template-setting (.layout-setting-panel) with a Full Width checkbox (.layout-width-setup). Full Width sets data-pagemargin='fullwidth' on the layout .sd-item.
Nested child-drop business rules (one element/widget per column; no layout-inside-layout) are enforced in layout-directive.js at runtime and are NOT DOM-assertable here — deferred.
Preview/Reader/Publish, media/tables/math/special-languages, multipart, persistence-after-reload, refresh and CLP outline/separator display are deferred.
notYetLiveVerified: Selectors are source-derived from layout4.html + layout-setting-panel.html + layout-directive.js but NOT yet run against a live authoring instance. A single headed run will confirm the drop + settings-panel selectors.
